name: Dark Contact
desc:
Activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each effect of "Dark Contact" once per turn);
● Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck that must be Special Summoned with "Dark Fusion", by shuffling its materials from your field, GY, and/or banishment into the Deck. (This is treated as a Fusion Summon with "Dark Fusion".)
● Add 1 "Supreme King's Castle" or "Dark Fusion" from your Deck to your hand.

action: Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Uses the player's banished cards as Fusion Materials
Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Special Summon with a different card
